description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Enhanced train service of East Rail Line for Tuen Ng Festival
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 端午節東鐵綫加強列車服務

2025-05-29T12:14:00.CONTENT_EN:
Transport Department has received notification from MTR Corporation Limited that MTRC will increase train frequency on the East Rail Line during Tuen Ng Festival holidays (31 May – 2 June). More passengers are expected in Lo Wu and Lok Ma Chau, please allow sufficient time for your journey. 
Please visit MTRCL's webpage for more information.
2025-05-29T12:14:00.CONTENT_CN:
運輸署接獲港鐵公司通知，東鐵綫於端午節期間(5月31日-6月2日)於不同時段加強列車服務。預料羅湖及落馬洲站乘客較多，請為行程預留充足時間。
詳情請參閱港鐵公司的網⾴。

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Cross-boundary Transport Services and Special Traffic Arrangements  during 2025 Tuen Ng Festival Long Weekend
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 2025年內地端午節長周末的跨境運輸服務及特別交通安排

2025-05-30T12:00:00.CONTENT_EN: During the Tuen Ng Festival long weekend of the Mainland, in anticipation of a large number of Mainland visitors and cross-boundary vehicles travelling between the Mainland and Hong Kong via various land-based boundary control points (BCPs), particularly on the first day (31 May 2025) and the last day (2 June 2025), the Transport Department (TD) urged travellers to plan their trips in advance and allow sufficient travelling time. The TD has co-ordinated with local and cross-boundary public transport operators to enhance their capacity and reserve sufficient vehicles and manpower to meet the travel needs of passengers. It is anticipated that the waiting time for public transport services, including the Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge (HZMB) shuttle bus (Gold Bus), may be longer. Travelers are advised to plan their journeys ahead, allow sufficient travelling time and travel outside peak periods as far as possible. Motorists are advised that, subject to actual traffic conditions, special traffic arrangements may be implemented at Lok Ma Chau Control Point and Shenzhen Bay Port from 31 May to 2 June 2025 to allow smooth access of public transport vehicles to above control points. Cross-boundary private cars may need to queue up for crossing the BCPs. Motorists should pay extra attention to variable message signs and traffic signs along the road. In case of traffic congestion, they should remain patient and follow the instructions of on-site Police. To plan their journeys ahead, members of the public can make use of TD’s “HKeMobility” mobile application or TD’s website (hkemobility. gov. hk/en/traffic-information/live/cctv) to access the snapshots of traffic conditions at inbound and outbound vehicle plazas of the HZMB Hong Kong Port. They can also check the real-time situations of the vehicle clearance plaza of the HZMB Zhuhai Port through the WeChat official accounts “hzmbzhport” or “zhuhaifabu” (traffic-info. gzazhka. com:5015/#/) (Chinese only), and check the forecast of peak hours of inbound and outbound vehicles at HZMB Zhuhai Port through the WeChat official account of the HZMB integrated information dissemination platform (mp. weixin. qq. com/s/QAQTRVe3lJFFqEK11mVUWw)] (Chinese only). Moreover, motorists are reminded to always comply with the traffic control measures implemented by the Zhuhai authority when driving on the HZMB Main Bridge. Vehicles shall not occupy the emergency lane unless instructed by the Zhuhai authority. Members of the public are advised to check the latest traffic news through radio, the television broadcasts and the HKeMobility application.
2025-05-30T12:00:00.CONTENT_CN: 內地端午節長周末期間，運輸署預計會有大量內地旅客及跨境車輛經各陸路管制站往來內地及香港，尤其是長週末的第一天（2025年5月31日）及最後一天（2025年6月2日），呼籲旅客及早規劃行程，預留充裕交通時間。 運輸署已協調本地及跨境公共運輸服務營辦商在長週末期間大運力，預留車輛及人手應對乘客的出行需求。運輸署預計公共運輸服務包括港珠澳大橋穿梭巴士（金巴）的等候時間或會較長，旅客應及早規劃行程，預留充裕交通時間，及盡量選擇於非繁忙時段出行。 駕駛人士請注意，視乎現場交通情況，落馬洲管制站及深圳灣口岸在2025年5月31日至6月2日期間或會實施特別交通安排，以便公共運輸車輛能暢順地進入上述口岸，跨境私家車或需輪候通過口岸。駕駛人士請特別留意沿途可變信息顯示屏及交通標誌。如遇交通受阻，請保持忍讓及遵從現場警務人員的指示。 市民可透過運輸署流動應用程式「香港出行易」或運輸署網頁（hkemobility.gov.hk/tc/traffic-information/live/cctv）查閱港珠澳大橋香港口岸出境及入境客車通關廣場的交通快拍，亦可透過「港珠澳大橋珠海口岸」或「珠海發布」微信公眾號內的「大橋口岸實時通關」服務（traffic-info.gzazhka.com:5015/#/），查閱大橋珠海口岸的車輛實時通關情況；以及透過「港珠澳大橋統一信息發佈平台」微信公眾號（mp.weixin.qq.com/s/QAQTRVe3lJFFqEK11mVUWw），查看大橋珠海口岸車輛出入境高峰時段預測，以便及早計劃行程。此外，運輸署亦提醒駕駛人士於大橋主橋行駛時，應時刻遵照珠海當局實施的交通管控措施，除非獲珠海市當局指示，否則車輛一律不可佔用應急車道。 市民請留意電台、電視台及「香港出行易」發放的最新交通消息。

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Takeover of Tai Lam Tunnel and Yuen Long Approach Road
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 接收大欖隧道及元朗引道

2025-05-31T00:00:00.CONTENT_EN: The Government has taken over the Tai Lam Tunnel at 0am today (31 May 2025) and implemented new tolls, with substantially reduced tolls for all vehicle types. To facilitate the launch of HKeToll, temporary traffic and transport arrangements will take place in phases in the vicinity of the Tai Lam Tunnel from 1am today, with the Tai Lam Tunnel and all slip road entrances being fully closed from 3am to 5am. Motorists should opt for Tuen Mun Road during the full closure. Members of the public can visit TD’s website for detailed toll information or use HKeMobility to obtain real-time toll information of Tai Lam Tunnel.
2025-05-31T00:00:00.CONTENT_CN: 政府已於今日（五月三十一日）零時零分接收大欖隧道並實施新收費，所有車種的收費已大幅下調。為配合易通行實施，大欖隧道一帶將於今日凌晨一時起分階段採取臨時交通及運輸安排。於凌晨一時至三時，收費廣場、所有經青朗公路前往大欖隧道的支路分階段封閉部分行車線。於凌晨三時至五時，大欖隧道和所有支路入口全線封閉，駕駛人士需改用屯門公路。 市民可瀏覽運輸署網頁查詢收費詳情或使用「香港出行易」以了解大欖隧道的實時收費。

2025-05-31T11:37:00.CONTENT_EN: The slow lane of Chatham Road North (Kwun Tong bound) near Fat Kwong Street which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.
2025-05-31T11:37:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的漆咸道北(往觀塘方向)近佛光街的慢線現已解封。
